logger.doc:name: before SAP call
logger.message: #["before calling SAP sample data from neon database"]

ee:variables.ee:set-variable:
%dw 2.0 output application/json --- { "query": "SELECT u.id AS "user_id", jr.id AS job_role_id, u.created_at FROM public."user" u JOIN public.job_role jr ON jr.id = u.job_role_id WHERE u.created_at >= NOW() - INTERVAL '6 years' ORDER BY u.created_at DESC", //"query": attributes.queryParams.query, "user":Mule::p('db.user'), "password": p('secure::db.password'), "url":Mule::p('db.userurl')
}

set-variable.value: #[%dw 2.0 output application/java --- "SELECT u.id AS \"user_id\", u.employee_id AS \"Employee ID\", u.first_name AS \"Employee Name\", jr.name AS \"Job Role\" FROM \"user\" u JOIN \"job_role\" jr ON jr.id = u.job_role_id WHERE u.id IN (" ++ (vars.uids map ($ as String) joinBy ",") ++ ") AND u.employee_type = 'internal' AND u.deleted_at IS NULL AND COALESCE(u.date_of_joining, u.created_at) >= (CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '100 days')"]
set-variable.doc:name: empid_name_ jobrole

set-variable.value:
#[%dw 2.0 output application/java --- "SELECT ulp.user_id, ulp.created_at AS \"Mandatory Learnings Assigned On\", ulp.target_date AS \"Mandatory Learnings Target Completion Date\", MAX(lpc.completed_at) AS \"Mandatory Learnings Completed On\",
ROUND( (COUNT(DISTINCT lpc.id)::decimal * 100) / NULLIF((SELECT COUNT(*) FROM \"plan_activities\" pa WHERE pa.plan_id = '71' AND pa.is_active = TRUE AND pa.deleted_at IS NULL), 0), 2) AS \"Mandatory Learnings Completion %\",
(SELECT CASE WHEN status_ilp.status IN ('passed','completed') THEN 'Completed' WHEN status_ilp.status = 'in_progress' THEN 'InProgress' WHEN status_ilp.status = 'mapped' THEN 'Scheduled' ELSE INITCAP(COALESCE(status_ilp.status::text, '')) END FROM ilp status_ilp WHERE status_ilp.user_id = ulp.user_id AND status_ilp.course_id = '918' AND status_ilp.deleted_at IS NULL ORDER BY status_ilp.created_at ASC LIMIT 1) AS \"Product Knowledge Status\",
(SELECT TO_CHAR(cs.start_date, 'DD-Mon-YYYY') || ' to ' || TO_CHAR(cs.end_date, 'DD-Mon-YYYY') FROM \"ilp\" sched_ilp JOIN \"course_schedule\" cs ON cs.id = sched_ilp.course_schedule_id WHERE sched_ilp.user_id = ulp.user_id AND sched_ilp.course_id = '918' AND sched_ilp.deleted_at IS NULL ORDER BY sched_ilp.created_at ASC LIMIT 1) AS \"Product Knowledge Schedule Date\",
(SELECT CASE WHEN kra_ilp.status IN ('passed','completed') THEN 'Completed' WHEN kra_ilp.status = 'in_progress' THEN 'InProgress' WHEN kra_ilp.status = 'mapped' THEN 'Scheduled' ELSE INITCAP(COALESCE(kra_ilp.status::text, '')) END FROM \"ilp\" kra_ilp WHERE kra_ilp.user_id = ulp.user_id AND kra_ilp.course_id = '918' AND kra_ilp.deleted_at IS NULL ORDER BY kra_ilp.created_at ASC LIMIT 1) AS \"KRA Status\",
(SELECT TO_CHAR(cs.start_date, 'DD-Mon-YYYY') || ' to ' || TO_CHAR(cs.end_date, 'DD-Mon-YYYY') FROM \"ilp\" kra_sched JOIN \"course_schedule\" cs ON cs.id = kra_sched.course_schedule_id WHERE kra_sched.user_id = ulp.user_id AND kra_sched.course_id = '918' AND kra_sched.deleted_at IS NULL ORDER BY kra_sched.created_at ASC LIMIT 1) AS \"KRA Schedule Date\",
(SELECT sga_ass.created_at FROM \"user_learning_plans\" sga_ass WHERE sga_ass.user_id = ulp.user_id AND sga_ass.plan_id = '71' AND sga_ass.deleted_at IS NULL ORDER BY sga_ass.created_at ASC LIMIT 1) AS \"Sales SGA Assigned On\",
(SELECT sga_tar.target_date FROM \"user_learning_plans\" sga_tar WHERE sga_tar.user_id = ulp.user_id AND sga_tar.plan_id = '71' AND sga_tar.deleted_at IS NULL ORDER BY sga_tar.created_at ASC LIMIT 1) AS \"Sales SGA Target Completion Date\",
(SELECT MAX(lpc_sga.completed_at) FROM \"user_learning_plans\" ulp_sga JOIN \"plan_activities\" pa_sga ON pa_sga.plan_id = ulp_sga.plan_id JOIN \"learning_plan_completion\" lpc_sga ON lpc_sga.user_plan_id = ulp_sga.id WHERE ulp_sga.user_id = ulp.user_id AND ulp_sga.plan_id = '71' AND pa_sga.is_active = TRUE AND lpc_sga.status IN ('completed','passed') AND lpc_sga.deleted_at IS NULL AND ulp_sga.deleted_at IS NULL) AS \"Sales SGA Completed On\",
(SELECT ROUND(COUNT(DISTINCT lpc_sga_p.id)::decimal * 100 / NULLIF((SELECT COUNT(*) FROM \"plan_activities\" pa_sga_p WHERE pa_sga_p.plan_id = '71' AND pa_sga_p.is_active = TRUE AND pa_sga_p.deleted_at IS NULL), 0), 2) FROM \"user_learning_plans\" ulp_sga_p JOIN \"learning_plan_completion\" lpc_sga_p ON lpc_sga_p.user_plan_id = ulp_sga_p.id WHERE ulp_sga_p.user_id = ulp.user_id AND ulp_sga_p.plan_id = '71' AND lpc_sga_p.status IN ('completed','passed') AND lpc_sga_p.deleted_at IS NULL AND ulp_sga_p.deleted_at IS NULL) AS \"Sales SGA Completion %\",
(SELECT CASE WHEN tech_ilp.status IN ('passed','completed') THEN 'Completed' WHEN tech_ilp.status = 'in_progress' THEN 'InProgress' WHEN tech_ilp.status = 'mapped' THEN 'Scheduled' ELSE INITCAP(COALESCE(tech_ilp.status::text, '')) END FROM \"ilp\" tech_ilp WHERE tech_ilp.user_id = ulp.user_id AND tech_ilp.course_id = '918' AND tech_ilp.deleted_at IS NULL ORDER BY tech_ilp.created_at ASC LIMIT 1) AS \"Technical Training Status\",
(SELECT TO_CHAR(cs.start_date, 'DD-Mon-YYYY') || ' to ' || TO_CHAR(cs.end_date, 'DD-Mon-YYYY') FROM \"ilp\" tech_sched_ilp JOIN \"course_schedule\" cs ON cs.id = tech_sched_ilp.course_schedule_id WHERE tech_sched_ilp.user_id = ulp.user_id AND tech_sched_ilp.course_id = '918' AND tech_sched_ilp.deleted_at IS NULL ORDER BY tech_sched_ilp.created_at ASC LIMIT 1) AS \"Technical Training Schedule Date\",
(SELECT ilp_e.created_at FROM \"ilp\" ilp_e JOIN \"course_version_control\" cvc ON cvc.id = ilp_e.course_id JOIN \"courses\" c ON c.id = cvc.course_id WHERE ilp_e.user_id = ulp.user_id AND c.course_type::text = 'wbt' AND ilp_e.deleted_at IS NULL AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM \"plan_domains\" pd JOIN \"domains\" d ON d.id = pd.domain_id JOIN \"plan_activities\" pa ON pa.plan_id = pd.plan_id WHERE d.domain_name = 'Organizational Orientation' AND pa.type = 'course' AND pa.type_id = ilp_e.course_id) ORDER BY ilp_e.created_at ASC LIMIT 1) AS \"E-Learning Assigned On\",
(SELECT early_ilp.created_at FROM \"ilp\" early_ilp WHERE early_ilp.user_id = ulp.user_id AND early_ilp.deleted_at IS NULL ORDER BY early_ilp.created_at ASC LIMIT 1) AS \"ILP Assigned On\"
FROM user_learning_plans ulp LEFT JOIN \"plan_activities\" pa ON pa.plan_id = ulp.plan_id AND pa.is_active = TRUE AND pa.deleted_at IS NULL LEFT JOIN \"learning_plan_completion\" lpc ON lpc.user_plan_id = ulp.id AND lpc.plan_id = ulp.plan_id AND lpc.item_id = pa.id AND lpc.status IN ('completed', 'passed') AND lpc.deleted_at IS NULL WHERE ulp.user_id IN (" ++ (vars.uids map ($ as String) joinBy ",") ++ ") AND ulp.plan_id = '71' AND ulp.deleted_at IS NULL GROUP BY ulp.user_id, ulp.created_at, ulp.target_date ORDER BY ulp.created_at"]

#["SELECT mm.mentee_id as \"user_id\", md.mentor_id AS mentor_user_id FROM mentor_mentee mm JOIN mentor_domain md ON md.id = mm.mentor_domain_id WHERE mm.mentee_id IN(" ++ (vars.uids map ($ as String) joinBy ",") ++ ") ORDER BY mm.created_at ASC;"]
#["SELECT u.employee_id as \"user_id\", u.employee_id AS \"Mentor ID\", u.first_name AS \"Mentor Name\" FROM \"user\" u WHERE u.id IN (" ++ (vars.mentIDs map ($ as String) joinBy ",") ++ ")"]

#[%dw 2.0 output application/java --- "SELECT mm.mentee_id AS \"user_id\",mm.created_at AS \"Mentor Assigned On\" FROM mentor_mentee mm WHERE mm.mentee_id IN (" ++ (vars.uids map ($ as String) joinBy ",") ++ ") ORDER BY mm.created_at ASC"]

#[%dw 2.0 output application/json --- ((payload."0".payload ++ payload."1".payload ++ payload."2".payload ++ payload."3".payload ++ payload."4".payload ) filter ((item, index) -> item."user_id" != null ) groupBy $.user_id pluck (items, key) -> (items reduce ((item, acc = {}) -> acc ++ (item - "user_id"))) ++ { user_id: key })]

ee:message.ee:set-payload: %dw 2.0 output application/json --- vars.aggregatedData filter (item) -> not ( (sizeOf(keysOf(item))) == 4 and (item["Employee ID"] != null or item["Employee ID"] == null) and (item["Employee Name"] != null or item["Employee Name"] == null) and (item["Job Role"] != null or item["Job Role"] == null) and (item["user_id"] != null or item["user_id"] == null) and (item["Mandatory Learnings Assigned On"] == null) and (item["Mentor Assigned On"] == null) and (item["SGA Assigned On"] == null) )

%dw 2.0 output application/json --- payload map (item) -> { "Employee ID": item."Employee ID" default "", "Employee Name": item."Employee Name" default "", "Job Role": item."Job Role" default "", "Mandatory Learnings Assigned On": item."Mandatory Learnings Assigned On" default "", "Mandatory Learnings Target Completion Date": item."Mandatory Learnings Target Completion Date" default "", "Mandatory Learnings Completed On": item."Mandatory Learnings Completed On" default "", "Mandatory Learnings Completion %": item."Mandatory Learnings Completion %" default "", "Product Knowledge Status": item."Product Knowledge Status" default "", "Product Knowledge Schedule Date": item."Product Knowledge Schedule Date" default "", "KRA Status": item."KRA Status" default "", "KRA Schedule Date": item."KRA Schedule Date" default "", "SGA Name": item."SGA Name" default "", "SGA Level": item."SGA Level" default "", "SGA Assigned On": item."SGA Assigned On" default "", "SGA Completed On": item."SGA Completed On" default "", "SGA Status": item."SGA Status" default "", "Sales SGA Assigned On": item."Sales SGA Assigned On" default "", "Sales SGA Target Completion Date": item."Sales SGA Target Completion Date" default "", "Sales SGA Completed On": item."Sales SGA Completed On" default "", "Sales SGA Completion %": item."Sales SGA Completion %" default "", "Mentor ID": item."Mentor ID" default "", "Mentor Name": item."Mentor Name" default "", "Mentor Assigned On": item."Mentor Assigned On" default "", "Technical Training Status": item."Technical Training Status" default "", "Technical Training Schedule Date": item."Technical Training Schedule Date" default "", "ILP Assigned On": item."ILP Assigned On" default "", "E-Learning Assigned On": item."E-Learning Assigned On" default "", "30-Day Survey Assigned On": item."30-Day Survey Assigned On" default "", "30-Day Survey Completed On": item."30-Day Survey Completed On" default "", "30-Day Survey Status": item."30-Day Survey Status" default "", "60-Day Survey Assigned On": item."60-Day Survey Assigned On" default "", "60-Day Survey Completed On": item."60-Day Survey Completed On" default "", "60-Day Survey Status": item."60-Day Survey Status" default "", "90-Day Survey Assigned On": item."90-Day Survey Assigned On" default "", "90-Day Survey Completed On": item."90-Day Survey Completed On" default "", "90-Day Survey Status": item."90-Day Survey Status" default "" }

set-payload.value: #[%dw 2.0 output application/json --- ((payload) filter ((item, index) -> item."Employee ID" != "" ))]

set-variable.value:
#[%dw 2.0 output application/java --- "SELECT sga.user_id, sga.\"SGA Assigned On\", sga.\"SGA Completed On\", sga.\"SGA Status\",
MAX(CASE WHEN s.title = 'New Hire 30-Day Feedback' THEN sp.start_date END) AS \"30-Day Survey Assigned On\", MAX(CASE WHEN s.title = 'New Hire 30-Day Feedback' THEN sp.completed_on END) AS \"30-Day Survey Completed On\", MAX(CASE WHEN s.title = 'New Hire 30-Day Feedback' THEN CASE WHEN LOWER(sp.status::text) = 'in_progress' THEN 'InProgress' WHEN LOWER(sp.status::text) = 'completed' THEN 'Completed' WHEN LOWER(sp.status::text) = 'pending' THEN 'Pending' ELSE COALESCE(sp.status::text, '') END END) AS \"30-Day Survey Status\",
MAX(CASE WHEN s.title = 'New Hire 60-Day Feedback' THEN sp.start_date END) AS \"60-Day Survey Assigned On\", MAX(CASE WHEN s.title = 'New Hire 60-Day Feedback' THEN sp.completed_on END) AS \"60-Day Survey Completed On\", MAX(CASE WHEN s.title = 'New Hire 60-Day Feedback' THEN CASE WHEN LOWER(sp.status::text) = 'in_progress' THEN 'InProgress' WHEN LOWER(sp.status::text) = 'completed' THEN 'Completed' WHEN LOWER(sp.status::text) = 'pending' THEN 'Pending' ELSE COALESCE(sp.status::text, '') END END) AS \"60-Day Survey Status\",
MAX(CASE WHEN s.title = 'New Hire 90-Day Feedback' THEN sp.start_date END) AS \"90-Day Survey Assigned On\", MAX(CASE WHEN s.title = 'New Hire 90-Day Feedback' THEN sp.completed_on END) AS \"90-Day Survey Completed On\", MAX(CASE WHEN s.title = 'New Hire 90-Day Feedback' THEN CASE WHEN LOWER(sp.status::text) = 'in_progress' THEN 'InProgress' WHEN LOWER(sp.status::text) = 'completed' THEN 'Completed' WHEN LOWER(sp.status::text) = 'pending' THEN 'Pending' ELSE COALESCE(sp.status::text, '') END END) AS \"90-Day Survey Status\"
FROM \"survey_participant\" sp JOIN \"survey\" s ON s.id = sp.survey_id LEFT JOIN ( SELECT us.user_id, us.created_at AS \"SGA Assigned On\", CASE WHEN LOWER(us.status::text) = 'certified' THEN us.updated_at ELSE NULL END AS \"SGA Completed On\", CASE WHEN LOWER(us.status::text) = 'in_progress' THEN 'InProgress' WHEN LOWER(us.status::text) = 'certified' THEN 'Certified' WHEN LOWER(us.status::text) = 'failed' THEN 'Failed' WHEN LOWER(us.status::text) = 'unlinked' THEN 'Unlinked' ELSE COALESCE(us.status::text, '') END AS \"SGA Status\" FROM \"user_sga\" us WHERE us.user_id IN (" ++ (vars.uids map ($ as String) joinBy ",") ++ ") ORDER BY us.created_at ASC LIMIT 1 ) sga ON sga.user_id = sp.user_id
WHERE sp.user_id IN (" ++ (vars.uids map ($ as String) joinBy ",") ++ ") AND s.title IN ('New Hire 30-Day Feedback', 'New Hire 60-Day Feedback', 'New Hire 90-Day Feedback') GROUP BY sga.user_id, sga.\"SGA Assigned On\", sga.\"SGA Completed On\", sga.\"SGA Status\""]

#[%dw 2.0 output application/java --- "SELECT s.level_id,us.user_id FROM user_sga us JOIN \"sga\" s ON s.id = us.sga_id WHERE us.user_id IN (" ++ (vars.uids map ($ as String) joinBy ",") ++ ") ORDER BY us.created_at ASC"]
